meta.statsFooter: 18 named locations | 6 PIM roles | 3 auth strengths

strengths: Legacy authentication is blocked for all users
Risk-driven controls cover high user and sign-in risk
concerns: Three report-only controls are older than six months
Admin MFA is not phishing-resistant in all paths
Two Microsoft-managed controls have no custom equivalent

topPriorities.title: Enforce phishing-resistant methods for privileged roles
topPriorities.evidence: Current admin policy allows standard MFA methods

topPriorities.title: Move token protection control from report-only to enabled
Close Microsoft-managed overlap gaps with custom controls
topPriorities.evidence: Two overlap rows are marked as Gap

layers.title: Catch-all geo block
layers.description: Main policy blocks non-approved countries and allows corporate regions only.

layers.title: Trusted office location exclusions
layers.description: Trusted office locations are excluded from some MFA challenges.

geolocationStrategy.note: One country-specific policy is still report-only.

callout.title: Admin MFA posture
callout.text: Privileged roles should move from standard MFA to phishing-resistant methods.
Risk controls are present but privileged user coverage can be tightened.

strengths.name: Legacy Exception
strengths.note: Should be retired from admin-facing flows

pimCoverage.note: Partial means role coverage is indirect through shared controls.

callout.title: Execution focus
callout.text: High-priority report-only items should move into staged enforcement this quarter.

policies.name: MFA for admins at admin portals
policies.description: Requires MFA for core admin roles in admin portals

policies.name: Phishing-resistant MFA for admins
policies.description: Requires phishing-resistant methods for admin roles

policies.name: Block legacy authentication
policies.description: Blocks legacy protocols for all users

callout.title: Critical gap
callout.text: No fully equivalent custom policy enforces phishing-resistant admin MFA.

high: Enforce phishing-resistant MFA for privileged roles
Enable token protection controls for core workloads
medium: Convert stale report-only controls with staged rollout windows
Add direct CA targeting for uncovered privileged roles

nearTerm.title: Enable token protection for Exchange and SharePoint

nearTerm: Move privileged role MFA to phishing-resistant strength
midTerm: Reduce standing active assignments in privileged roles
